FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: User who requested the generation.

FIELD.NAME: contextid
FIELD.COMMENT: Category context the job was started in (capability + privacy scope).

FIELD.NAME: courseid
FIELD.COMMENT: Target course id, once materialized; NULL until then.

FIELD.NAME: mode
FIELD.COMMENT: Generation mode: outlinefirst | automatic.

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: extracting | blueprinted | awaiting_review | materializing | assessing | complete | failed.

FIELD.NAME: estimatedspend
FIELD.COMMENT: Estimated generation cost computed at the blueprint stage.

FIELD.NAME: actualspend
FIELD.COMMENT: Actual accrued generation cost.

TABLE.NAME: coursegen_source
TABLE.COMMENT: Uploaded source references and extracted-corpus metadata per job.

FIELD.NAME: type
FIELD.COMMENT: pdf | docx | pptx | text | topic.

FIELD.NAME: filename
FIELD.COMMENT: Original filename for uploaded sources; NULL for pasted text/topic.

FIELD.NAME: itemid
FIELD.COMMENT: File API itemid for the stored source file, if any.

FIELD.NAME: extractedchars
FIELD.COMMENT: Size of the normalized corpus extracted from this source.

FIELD.NAME: corpus
FIELD.COMMENT: Normalized source corpus: JSON of ordered blocks with heading/structure metadata (SPEC §4).

FIELD.NAME: status
FIELD.COMMENT: pending | extracted | failed.

TABLE.NAME: coursegen_blueprint
TABLE.COMMENT: The editable, versioned generation plan (IR) for a job.

FIELD.NAME: version
FIELD.COMMENT: Monotonic version; bumped on each edit.

FIELD.NAME: iscurrent
FIELD.COMMENT: 1 for the current version of a job's blueprint, else 0.

FIELD.NAME: title
FIELD.COMMENT: Proposed course title.

FIELD.NAME: intro
FIELD.COMMENT: Proposed course description/summary.

FIELD.NAME: content
FIELD.COMMENT: Serialized (JSON) plan: ordered sections, objectives, content types, image flags, assessment spec.

TABLE.NAME: coursegen_log
TABLE.COMMENT: Per-stage / per-call generation audit log (SPEC §7). Never stores credentials.

FIELD.NAME: userid
FIELD.COMMENT: User who triggered the logged action, when attributable.

FIELD.NAME: stage
FIELD.COMMENT: ingest | extract | blueprint | materialize | assess | finalize.

FIELD.NAME: tier
FIELD.COMMENT: reasoning | drafting | image; NULL for non-AI stages.

FIELD.NAME: actionname
FIELD.COMMENT: core_ai action used (SPEC §10.2).

FIELD.NAME: provider
FIELD.COMMENT: Resolved AI provider, as reported by core_ai (SPEC §10.2).

FIELD.NAME: model
FIELD.COMMENT: Resolved model, as reported by core_ai.

FIELD.NAME: outcome
FIELD.COMMENT: success | failure.

FIELD.NAME: detail
FIELD.COMMENT: Non-sensitive note; credential values are never stored.
